items.title: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
items.summary: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as cofounder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati.
